locations.name: 森林
locations.summary: 森林，是一个高密度树木的区域（或历史上，森林是一个为狩猎而留出的荒地），涵蓋大約9.4％的地球表面（或佔約30％的總土地面積）。聯合國糧食及農業組織(FAO)將森林定義為「面積超過 0.5 公頃、樹木超過 5 公尺且樹冠覆蓋率超過 10%…

relations.subject: Icterine greenbul
relations.evidence: The icterine greenbul is found in Africa from Guinea to Ghana; southern Nigeria to western and southern Uganda, eastern and central Democratic Republic of the Congo and extreme north-western Angola. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, and moist savanna
